description: motor speed command at measurement time
evidence: Motor speed command (data No. 16) This parameter sets the motor speed command at measurement time. The speed is clamped at the maximum speed of the motor

description: actual motor speed measurement during operation
evidence: Motor speed (data No. 19) These are spindle motor speed data. Observing data include motor speed

description: motor torque command as percentage of maximum torque
evidence: Torque command (data No. 90) This is motor torque command data. If shift amount 8, the check board output value is 100%/2.5V

description: position error data for spindle orientation (4096 pulses/rev)
evidence: Position error (data No. 136) This is position error data (4096 pulses/rev) for spindle orientation

description: velocity error during spindle control operation
evidence: Velocity error ±128 min⁻¹ at ±5 V, ±256min⁻¹ at ±5 V if d-06 (d-10) is set to 13

description: synchronous error value converted for the spindle
evidence: Synchronous error (value converted for the spindle: 4096 pulses/rev) ±128 pulses at ±5 V, ±256 pulses at ±5 V if d-06 (d-10) is set to 1, ±512 pulses at ±5 V if d-06 (d-10) is set to 2

description: motor voltage setting on orientation or servo mode
evidence: Motor voltage on orientation Unit of data: 1%, Valid data range: 0 to 100. This data is used to specify the motor voltage for spindle orientation

description: time period for acceleration/deceleration alarm detection disable
evidence: Setting of acceleration/deceleration time, Unit of data: 1sec, Valid data range: 0 to 255, Standard setting value: 10

description: time from spindle orientation command input to completion
evidence: Spindle orientation time (data No. 305) This is the time from the instant when a spindle orientation command is input to the instant when spindle orientation is completed. It is indicated in ms units

description: speed arrival signal (sara) detection status when motor reaches specified speed
evidence: Speed arrival signal (SARA) detection range. When the motor speed reaches within ±(setting data/10)% of a specified speed, the speed arrival signal (SARA) is set to 1

description: signal indicating motor has stopped
evidence: Zero speed detection signal (SSTA) when motor speed is 0.75% of maximum speed or less

description: load detection signal 1 (ldt1a) when motor output exceeds threshold
evidence: Load detection signal 1 (LDT1A) detection range. When the output of the spindle motor is (setting data)% of the maximum output or more, load detection signal 1 (LDT1A) is set to 1

description: vibration velocity measurement during spindle operation
evidence: Vibration velocity [mm/s] rms 10-2000 Hz at 4000 rpm, 8000 rpm. Severity classification ranges from 0.0 to 0.9 Very Smooth to 10.7 and up Very Rough

description: vibration acceleration measurement during spindle operation
evidence: Vibration acceleration [g] rms 2-20 kHz at 4000 rpm, 8000 rpm with scale markings: 0.05, 0.1, 0.15, 0.2, 0.25 and 0.1, 0.2, 0.3, 0.4

description: current command for motor control
evidence: Current conversion constant, Maximum current constant, Current coefficient for magnetic flux reduction parameters are specified for motor control

description: high-speed spindle orientation sequence state
evidence: Spindle orientation sequence (data No. 298) States: A: Before spindle orientation begins, B: Interval from orientation command to speed reached, C: Linear deceleration interval, D: Position loop closed, E: Spindle orientation completed

description: signal indicating spindle has reached commanded speed
evidence: Speed arrival signal (SARA) detection when motor speed reaches within specified range of commanded speed

description: whether spindle orientation reached target position within tolerance
evidence: Orientation completion signal detection level. Sets the detecting level of orientation completion signal (ORARA). ORARA = 1 is satisfied if the position error is within the setting

description: maximum allowable spindle motor speed for the operation
evidence: Maximum motor speed, This parameter sets a maximum spindle motor speed, Unit of data: 1min⁻¹, Valid data range: 0 to 32767

description: delay time from motor stop to power cutoff
evidence: Delay time until the motor power is turned off, Unit of data: 10ms, Valid data range: 0 to 1000, Standard setting value: 20(200ms)

description: indicates if torque limitation is currently applied
evidence: Torque limitation value to be applied when the torque limitation command HIGH (TLMHA) or the torque limitation command LOW (TLMLA) is specified

description: alarm signal indicating spindle fault condition
evidence: Spindle alarm signal (ALMA) indicates fault conditions like overspeed, velocity error excess, or overload

description: current spindle operation mode
evidence: Multiple operation modes including velocity control mode, orientation, rigid tapping, and spindle synchronous control

description: acceleration value when soft start/stop function is enabled
evidence: Soft start/stop setting time sets an acceleration value (speed change rate) when the soft start/stop function is enabled

description: motor current measurement during operation
evidence: Current overload alarm detection level and current detection offset compensation parameters referenced

description: motor temperature measurement during operation
evidence: Motor overheat detect level (2-word) and temperature monitoring time constant parameters referenced

description: target stop position for spindle orientation (360 degrees/4096)
evidence: Position coder method orientation stop position with unit of data 1 pulse unit (360 degrees/4096), valid data range 0 to 4095

description: status indicating if any spindle alarm was detected during operation
evidence: Spindle alarm signal (ALMA) and various alarm detection parameters like excessive speed level, overload detection level, velocity error excess detection level

description: time constant for deceleration phase during operation
evidence: Setting of acceleration/deceleration time with unit of data 1sec, valid data range 0 to 255, standard setting value 10
